issues.title: 429 Maximum effective tokens exceeded (25M cap)
issues.recurrence: ABSENT 2026-06-07 (and prior 2 windows). Daily Ambient Context Optimizer not in this small window's run-set; no 429 observed. Cap edge …
issues.note: Heavy daily-aggregation workflows hover at/over the 25M effective-token cap. Intermittent; depends on run-set size. Soft pre-cap guard still not in place.

issues.note_2026_06_08: session.idle 870s timeout on PR Code Quality Reviewer 27160990743 AFTER emitting valid review (wasted work); tool-perm-lockout on Daily Safe Output Integrator 27161455868 (read test.go denied)

[aw] Failure Investigator (claude) also hit session.idle x2 but recovered. Dominant failure class this window (3 of 5 hard fails).

issues.title: update_pull_request update_branch blocked: GitHub App lacks 'workflows' permission for PRs touching .lock.yml

issues.title: 429 Maximum AI credits exceeded (account/daily credit cap ~1000) aborts heavy prod-main run mid-flight
issues.note: Daily Ambient Context Optimizer (copilot, prod-main, run 27233269431) ran 57 turns / 3.0M tokens then the Copilot API returned CAPIError 429 'Maximum AI credits exceeded (1026.775860 / 1000)' after 5…
issues.fix: Add a soft pre-cap credit guard that checks remaining daily AI credits before the heaviest aggregation turns and degrades gracefully (emit partial output + noop) instead of 429-aborting; or raise the cap for the few heavy prod-main aggregators; or shard Ambient's work across smaller runs.
issues.note_2026_06_10: RECUR (was rec=1, ABSENT prior window): Daily Ambient Context Optimizer 27303973614 again hit CAPIError 429 Maximum AI credits exceeded (1003.010010 / 1000) after 5 retries (87.8s wait) -> attempt 1 failed -> [aw] failed. SAME workflow as first sighting (27233269431). Confirms the heavy prod-main aggregator reliably brushes the ~1000 daily AIC cap. Soft pre-cap guard still not shipped.

issues.title: Copilot CLI step hits hard action timeout (5/15-min tiers) — legit overrun OR degenerate self-loop
issues.note: Test Quality Sentinel (copilot, PR branch copilot/feature-dangerously-disable-sandbox-agent, run 27234356749) ran 20 turns / 649k tokens of valid review work, then '##[error]The action Execute GitHub…
issues.fix: Raise the Copilot CLI step timeout for review-heavy workflows, or add periodic checkpoint flushing of the review so a timeout still emits the buffered safe-output instead of reddening with nothing.
issues.note_2026_06_10: RECUR day2 (different timeout tier): GitHub Remote MCP Authentication Test (copilot, main, run 27258574627) hit '##[error]The action Execute GitHub Copilot CLI has timed out after 5 minutes' after a D…

issues.title: Image download step fails pulling node:lts-alpine from Docker Hub (registry-1.docker.io) — exit 123, agent nev
issues.note: download_docker_images.sh pulls all ghcr.io images successfully but TIMES OUT on the single Docker Hub image node:lts-alpine: 'Error response from daemon: Get https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/: context…
issues.fix: Mirror/cache node:lts-alpine in ghcr.io (or pin to a ghcr-hosted node image) so the agent setup no longer depends on Docker Hub; alternatively authenticate Docker Hub pulls to lift the anonymous rate limit, or add a longer/backed-off retry.

issues.title: repo-memory push fails: new orphan memory branch needs a manually-seeded signed first commit (GH013 rule viola
issues.note: AGENT SUCCEEDED (agent/detection/safe_outputs all success) but the post-agent push_repo_memory job failed 4/4 attempts: 'remote: error: GH013: Repository rule violations found for refs/heads/memory/gi…
issues.fix: Seed memory/git-simulator manually with one signed commit (per the harness instructions), OR have the repo-memory push step create the orphan branch's first commit as a signed commit, OR exempt memory/* branches from the signed-commit ruleset.

issues.title: Gemini model unknown_model_ai_credits: no AI-credits pricing / default fallback
issues.recurrence: NEW 2026-06-11. Smoke Gemini x2 (runs 27368963230 PR#38642, 27369158891 PR#38684) FAIL with ApiError unknown_model_ai_credits for model 'gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview': 'has no AI credits pricing and no default pricing is configured'. api-proxy AWF config lacks a pricing table entry for this gemini model AND apiProxy.defaultAiCreditsPricing fallback is unset. Surfaced by Smoke Gemini probe; gemini engine 0/2 this window.
issues.fix: Add gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview (and likely other new gemini models) to the api-proxy AI-credits pricing table, OR set apiProxy.defaultAiCreditsPricing fallback (e.g. {input:3.0,output:15.0}) in AWF config so unknown models do not hard-fail.

issues.title: daily_effective_workflow_exceeded gate fails activation -> agent skipped -> PR run reddened
issues.recurrence: NEW 2026-06-11. ~20:05-20:51Z the daily effective-workflow budget cap tripped (activation output daily_effective_workflow_exceeded=='true'). Affected 3x Matt Pocock Skills Reviewer + 1x Test Quality Sentinel (all PR-triggered). agent.if success()==false -> agent CORRECTLY SKIPPED (zero token waste) but run conclusion=failure. Enforcement is by-design but presents as a red 'failure' on PRs (poor signal/UX) rather than a neutral skip.
issues.fix: Consider surfacing daily-cap gating as a neutral/skipped conclusion (or a clear annotation) instead of run=failure so PR authors don't see false red. Confirm the cap threshold is intended for the evening burst.

issues.title: AOAI apikey path: persistent 'transient API error. Retrying...' loop burns tokens then fails
issues.recurrence: NEW 2026-06-11. Smoke Copilot - AOAI (apikey) model o4-mini-aw (run 27369250600) entered a long 'Request failed due to a transient API error. Retrying...' loop, ran 73 turns / 2.15M tokens, then failed. High token waste for a smoke probe. Possibly AOAI endpoint instability or o4-mini-aw routing; only on AOAI-apikey smoke variant (feature branch).
issues.fix: Cap retry budget / add max-token guard on AOAI smoke probe so a transient-error loop can't burn 2M+ tokens. Investigate AOAI o4-mini-aw endpoint stability.
